headline: Wells Fargo Lures Morgan Stanley, UBS Advisors Representing More Than $9B
summary: In less than a week, Wells Fargo Advisors announced the addition of two teams from Morgan Stanley and one from UBS, which had been overseeing in total more than $9 billion in client assets.

headline: UK Elections Threaten to End the Pound’s Resilient Run
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Investor worries over higher energy prices and elections that look to be disastrous for the government pushed the UK’s long-term borrowing costs to the highest level since 1998 this week.
